title: Elden Ring Nightreign Gear
description: Introduces different armors from Elden Ring to Minecraft.
body:
About Elden Ring Nightreign Gear
The FazBrick Studios Team presents Elden Ring Nightreign Gear. A simple and lightweight mod that brings six iconic armor sets from the game Elden Ring: Nightreign into Minecraft.

Designed to blend seamlessly with Vanilla gameplay, this mod lets players enjoy the look of legendary armor while exploring the Minecraft world.

Elden Ring Nightreign Gear is compatible with modern versions of Minecraft and will receive small updates when needed.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1593637755be6c6004ae541d770187ebc8faee73_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d26f4b85a181c3f042f012a2e74789883b1814d_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/754a93874c5fed2d169d68ac3f36a06d1ab11b60_0.webp)

                                          I can put this in Modpacks?
Of course! Feel free to add this mod to your modpacks. I encourage you to do so, just don't forget to give credit.

 

                                              Redistribution License
You are not allowed to upload or redistribute this mod on websites or domains other than Curseforge. 

This specifically includes RU-Minecraft.
